channel.title: Druid - verifiable environmental-data watchdog: EPA Climate Change Indicators
channel.description: Classified changes for EPA Climate Change Indicators.

item.title: NumericThresholdChange [High] - epa-climate-indicators
item.description: NumericThresholdChange [High] in epa-climate-indicators: {'context': 'threshold for benzene is', 'from': '10 ppb', 'to': '15 ppb', 'unit': 'ppb'}
